nonclaims: This matrix does not establish an exact locality quotient.
This matrix does not promote any learned partition, query, witness, or report above the nominal tier.
Absence of a counterexample is not evidence of equality, lumpability, memory loss, or safety.
The frozen oracle tables are synthetic and are not evidence about protected tasks, pilot tasks, Lean RPC behavior, or LLM behavior.
No hard, robust, MaxEnt, envelope, similarity, production-ranking, GPU, SSH, continuous-time, gradient, or parallel claim is evaluated here.
Any non-gain, degraded, blocked, or execution-failed disposition leaves the accepted I0 hard line unchanged.
